hero.description: I specialize in building responsive, high-performing web applications.

about.title: About
about.description: I am a Developer with proven experience building scalable, responsive web applications. I specialize in translating complex designs into pixel-perfect, accessible user interfaces. With a strong foundation in modern styling and API integration, I bridge the gap between design and robust front-end architecture. Thriving in collaborative Agile environments, I actively engage with cross-functional teams and manage deployments.

orgs.name: Institute of Computer Engineers of the Philippines Student Edition - Region 1 (ICpEP.SE-R1)
orgs.description: Assisted in organizing events with the ICpEP-R1 Board of Directors (2018-2019):

orgs.name: Institute of Computer Engineers of the Philippines Student Edition - PHINMA University of Pangasinan (ICpEP.SE-PHINMA UPang)
bullets: Acted as the chief executive of the ICpEP.SE
Represented the members according to their interest, in all the policies in the University
Presided over all meetings of ICpEP.SE
Signed all documents and communications of the ICpEP.SE and approve vouchers representing legitimate disbursement of the ICpEP.SE fund
Rendered a per semester report to the members on the performance of the ICpEP.SE
Exercised such powers necessary or incidental to the performance of his/her function

orgs.name: University of Pangasinan Association of Computer Engineering Students (UPACES)
bullets: Responsible for establishing the means for the income to flow for the UPACES
Responsible for promoting income-generating projects for the organization
Exercised such other functions as may be delegated to them by the UPACES President

schools.name: PHINMA - University of Pangasinan
schools.degree: Bachelor of Science - BS, Computer Engineering • 2015 - 2020
bullets: Designing and testing computer hardware boards, memory devices and routers
Writing and testing software for mobile devices and computers
Designing, setting up and testing networks
